'''Blook''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who flew for the [[Khuiumin Survivors]]' [[Rock Squadron]]. He was killed during [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Leonia Tavira]]'s [[Battle of Xa Fel (11 ABY)|assault]] on [[Xa Fel/Legends|Xa Fel]] when he attacked a formation of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[A-wing]]s that were going after the ''[[Backstab]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
